name: Recent Install - CEL On, No Codes
description: Recent-install caller, light on, vehicle not yet scanned.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: After my recent install the check engine light came on, but I haven't had it scanned yet.
expectedOutcome: Agent recommends having the vehicle scanned at a local repair shop or auto parts store before submitting (codes help the warranty team determine cause), explains they can still submit noting it isn't scanned, and gives form guidance.
